description: Replay corpus — historically-malicious npm tarballs and the rules that retrospectively flag them. The .tgz files themselves are gitignored (they literally are malware); run scripts/fetch_corpus.sh to populate, then `cargo test --test corpus_replay -- --ignored` to run.

entries.note: The wrapping package that transitively pulled flatmap-stream. event-stream itself is benign; this entry is here so the corpus can demonstrate that we DO NOT false-positive on it.
event-stream 2018 incident. Ships large base64 blob + eval, gated on require.main.filename matching copay-dash.
Oct 2021 maintainer-account takeover. preinstall fetches and chmod+x a binary cryptominer.
Nov 2021 hijack — analogous to ua-parser-js with the same preinstall fetch-and-execute pattern.
Nov 2021 hijack, same family as ua-parser-js and coa.
peacenotwar / protestware 2022. Geolocation-gated destructive overwrite of files under user homedir.
